# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
consumers:
  - username: "user1"
    custom_id: "cust123"
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_param_name: "apikey"
          run_on_preflight: true
          anonymous: ""
          hide_credentials: false
          key_claim_name: "sub"
          clock_skew: 0
          key_set: "default"

  - username: "user2"
    custom_id: "cust456"
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_param_name: "apikey"
          run_on_preflight: true
          anonymous: ""
          hide_credentials: false
          key_claim_name: "sub"
          clock_skew: 0
          key_set: "default"

  - username: "user3"
    custom_id: "cust789"
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_param_name: "apikey"
          run_on_preflight: true
          anonymous: ""
          hide_credentials: false
          key_claim_name: "sub"
          clock_skew: 0
          key_set: "default"

upstreams:
  - name: "user-service"
    host: "user-service.default.svc.cluster.local"
    port: 8080
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        https_verify_certificate: true
        healthy:
          interval: 0
          successes: 0
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 0
          timeouts: 0
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses: []
          successes: 0
        unhealthy:
          http_statuses: []
          timeouts: 0
          tcp_failures: 0
    scheme: "http"
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 1000
    send_timeout: 1000
    read_timeout: 1000
    tags:
      - "service"
      - "user-service"

  - name: "order-service"
    host: "order-service.default.svc.cluster.local"
    port: 8080
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        https_verify_certificate: true
        healthy:
          interval: 0
          successes: 0
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 0
          timeouts: 0
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses: []
          successes: 0
        unhealthy:
          http_statuses: []
          timeouts: 0
          tcp_failures: 0
    scheme: "http"
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 1000
    send_timeout: 1000
    read_timeout: 1000
    tags:
      - "service"
      - "order-service"

  - name: "payment-service"
    host: "payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local"
    port: 8080
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        https_verify_certificate: true
        healthy:
          interval: 0
          successes: 0
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 0
          timeouts: 0
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses: []
          successes: 0
        unhealthy:
          http_statuses: []
          timeouts: 0
          tcp_failures: 0
    scheme: "http"
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 1000
    send_timeout: 1000
    read_timeout: 1000
    tags:
      - "service"
      - "payment-service"

routes:
  - name: "user-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/users"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream:
      name: "user-service"
    plugins:
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          limit:
            - 1000
          window_size:
            - 60
          window_type: "sliding"
          sync_rate: 0
          algorithm: "sliding_window"
          namespace: "rate-limiting"
          strategy: "local"
          hide_client_headers: false
          fault_tolerant: true
          redis:
            host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
            port: 6379
            database: 0
            password: ""
            ssl: false
            ssl_verify: false
            ssl_server_name: ""
            timeout: 2000
            connection_pool: 10
            sentinel: ""
            master: ""
            sentinel_username: ""
            sentinel_password: ""
            username: ""
            cluster:
              nodes:
                - host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
                  port: 6379
              username: ""
              password: ""
              ssl: false
              ssl_verify: false
              ssl_server_name: ""
              timeout: 2000
              connection_pool: 10
          retry_after_jitter_max: 0
          http_method: "POST"
          redis_cluster:
            nodes:
              - host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
                port: 6379
          redis_sentinel:
            sentinel: ""
            master: ""
            password: ""
            username: ""
            ssl: false
            ssl_verify: false
            ssl_server_name: ""
            timeout: 2000
            connection_pool: 10
        enabled: true

      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          header_name: "Authorization"
          key_claim_name: "sub"
          realm: "kong"
          secret_is_base64: false
          run_on_preflight: true
          anonymous: ""
          hide_credentials: false
          clock_skew: 0
          algorithms:
            - "HS256"
          claims_to_verify:
            - "exp"
          jwks:
            - uri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
              ssl_verify: true
              timeout: 10000
        enabled: true

      - name: "request-transformer"
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-For: {remote_addr}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Proto: {scheme}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Host: {host}"
              - "X-Real-IP: {remote_addr}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Port: {server_port}"
              - "X-Original-URI: {uri}"
          remove:
            headers:
              - "X-Powered-By"
              - "X-Backend-Service"
              - "Server"
              - "X-Response-Time"
              - "X-Backend-Server"
        enabled: true

      - name: "response-transformer"
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Response-Time: {response_time}"
              - "X-Backend-Server: {upstream_host}"
              - "X-Backend-Service: {upstream_name}"
          remove:
            headers:
              - "X-Powered-By"
              - "X-Backend-Service"
              - "Server"
              - "X-Response-Time"
              - "X-Backend-Server"
        enabled: true

  - name: "order-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/orders"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream:
      name: "order-service"
    plugins:
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          limit:
            - 500
          window_size:
            - 60
          window_type: "sliding"
          sync_rate: 0
          algorithm: "sliding_window"
          namespace: "rate-limiting"
          strategy: "local"
          hide_client_headers: false
          fault_tolerant: true
          redis:
            host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
            port: 6379
            database: 0
            password: ""
            ssl: false
            ssl_verify: false
            ssl_server_name: ""
            timeout: 2000
            connection_pool: 10
            sentinel: ""
            master: ""
            sentinel_username: ""
            sentinel_password: ""
            username: ""
            cluster:
              nodes:
                - host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
                  port: 6379
              username: ""
              password: ""
              ssl: false
              ssl_verify: false
              ssl_server_name: ""
              timeout: 2000
              connection_pool: 10
          retry_after_jitter_max: 0
          http_method: "POST"
          redis_cluster:
            nodes:
              - host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
                port: 6379
          redis_sentinel:
            sentinel: ""
            master: ""
            password: ""
            username: ""
            ssl: false
            ssl_verify: false
            ssl_server_name: ""
            timeout: 2000
            connection_pool: 10
        enabled: true

      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          header_name: "Authorization"
          key_claim_name: "sub"
          realm: "kong"
          secret_is_base64: false
          run_on_preflight: true
          anonymous: ""
          hide_credentials: false
          clock_skew: 0
          algorithms:
            - "HS256"
          claims_to_verify:
            - "exp"
          jwks:
            - uri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
              ssl_verify: true
              timeout: 10000
        enabled: true

      - name: "request-transformer"
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-For: {remote_addr}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Proto: {scheme}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Host: {host}"
              - "X-Real-IP: {remote_addr}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Port: {server_port}"
              - "X-Original-URI: {uri}"
          remove:
            headers:
              - "X-Powered-By"
              - "X-Backend-Service"
              - "Server"
              - "X-Response-Time"
              - "X-Backend-Server"
        enabled: true

      - name: "response-transformer"
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Response-Time: {response_time}"
              - "X-Backend-Server: {upstream_host}"
              - "X-Backend-Service: {upstream_name}"
          remove:
            headers:
              - "X-Powered-By"
              - "X-Backend-Service"
              - "Server"
              - "X-Response-Time"
              - "X-Backend-Server"
        enabled: true

  - name: "payment-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/payments"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream:
      name: "payment-service"
    plugins:
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          limit:
            - 200
          window_size:
            - 60
          window_type: "sliding"
          sync_rate: 0
          algorithm: "sliding_window"
          namespace: "rate-limiting"
          strategy: "local"
          hide_client_headers: false
          fault_tolerant: true
          redis:
            host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
            port: 6379
            database: 0
            password: ""
            ssl: false
            ssl_verify: false
            ssl_server_name: ""
            timeout: 2000
            connection_pool: 10
            sentinel: ""
            master: ""
            sentinel_username: ""
            sentinel_password: ""
            username: ""
            cluster:
              nodes:
                - host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
                  port: 6379
              username: ""
              password: ""
              ssl: false
              ssl_verify: false
              ssl_server_name: ""
              timeout: 2000
              connection_pool: 10
          retry_after_jitter_max: 0
          http_method: "POST"
          redis_cluster:
            nodes:
              - host: "redis.default.svc.cluster.local"
                port: 6379
          redis_sentinel:
            sentinel: ""
            master: ""
            password: ""
            username: ""
            ssl: false
            ssl_verify: false
            ssl_server_name: ""
            timeout: 2000
            connection_pool: 10
        enabled: true

      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          header_name: "Authorization"
          key_claim_name: "sub"
          realm: "kong"
          secret_is_base64: false
          run_on_preflight: true
          anonymous: ""
          hide_credentials: false
          clock_skew: 0
          algorithms:
            - "HS256"
          claims_to_verify:
            - "exp"
          jwks:
            - uri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
              ssl_verify: true
              timeout: 10000
        enabled: true

      - name: "request-transformer"
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-For: {remote_addr}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Proto: {scheme}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Host: {host}"
              - "X-Real-IP: {remote_addr}"
              - "X-Forwarded-Port: {server_port}"
              - "X-Original-URI: {uri}"
          remove:
            headers:
              - "X-Powered-By"
              - "X-Backend-Service"
              - "Server"
              - "X-Response-Time"
              - "X-Backend-Server"
        enabled: true

      - name: "response-transformer"
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Response-Time: {response_time}"
              - "X-Backend-Server: {upstream_host}"
              - "X-Backend-Service: {upstream_name}"
          remove:
            headers:
              - "X-Powered-By"
              - "X-Backend-Service"
              - "Server"
              - "X-Response-Time"
              - "X-Backend-Server"
        enabled: true
